title: eupatoriastrum pochutlanum
intro: Eupatoriastrum pochutlanum, also known as "Pochutlan's eupatorium," is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been observed to reduce pain and fight off infections. The health benefits of Eupatoriastrum pochutlanum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve its leaves being dried and made into teas, infusions, or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
